command:
curl -s https://www.hyo.world/data/feed.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print('Agents:', list(d.get('agents',{}).keys()))
print()
for r in d.get('reports',[]):
    print(f'{r[\"title\"]} by {r[\"author\"]}')
    s = r.get('sections',{})
    # Show first 120 chars of introspection/summary to verify tone
    for k in ['summary','introspection']:
        if k in s and isinstance(s[k], str):
            print(f'  [{k}]: {s[k][:150]}...')
    print()
"
